product_name: Instinctive Choice All Life Stage Cat Food
short_summary: A premium grain-free cat food with a blend of chicken, turkey, and trout, designed to meet the nutritional needs of cats.

formulation_philosophy.summary: The formulation philosophy emphasizes high-quality proteins and balanced nutrition for cats.
evidence: Starting with high-quality proteins, this recipe features a succulent blend of chicken, turkey, and trout.

Organic chicken plus turkey, liver & shrimp

use_cases.point: Suitable for all life stages of cats
evidence: Formulated to meet the nutritional levels established by the AAFCO Cat Food Nutrient Profiles for all life stages.
With a soft, pate-style texture, gone are the days of your cat turning their whiskers up at mealtime! Content purrs and clean bowls are guaranteed. - Grain free

competitive_positioning.positioning_statement: Competitive pricing compared to other brands
evidence: This comparison has been created by Life's Abundance and is meant to illustrate the differences in pricing between pet food it provides under the mark Life’s Abundance® and those provided by other companies. All entries related to pricing in the comparison table have been made on the basis of information available January 2023 and are based on typical suggested retail or list price of each brand, gathered from searching various online retailers January 2023.

claims_needing_review: Guaranteed Analysis: Crude Protein (min) 12.0%, Crude Fat (min) 7.5%, Crude Fiber (max) 1.0%, Moisture (max) 78.0%, Magnesium (max) 0.04%, Vitamin E (min) 60 IU/kg, Taurine (min) 0.10%, Omega-6 Fatty Acids* (min) 1.20%, Omega-3 Fatty Acids* (min) 0.30% *Not recognized as an essential nutrient by the AAFCO cat food nutrient profiles.
